hero.title: Your Bookmarks, Supercharged
hero.subtitle: The most powerful bookmark manager with AI-powered organization, advanced filtering, and seamless sync across all your devices.

featuresSection.title: Powerful Features
featuresSection.subtitle: Everything you need to master your bookmarks

features.title: Smart Collections
features.description: Let AI do the heavy lifting. Smart Collections automatically organize your bookmarks based on content, topics, and usage patterns. No more manual sorting—just save and let the magic happen.
highlights: Automatic categorization by topic and content type
Dynamic collections that update as you save
Visual analytics of your browsing interests

features.title: Advanced Filtering
features.description: Find exactly what you need in seconds. Filter by tags, dates, domains, authors, and more. Combine multiple filters to create powerful search queries that surface the perfect bookmark every time.
highlights: Search by domain, author, or publication date
Save custom filter presets for quick access

features.title: X/Twitter Import
features.description: Bring all your Twitter/X bookmarks with you. Native import support means one-click migration of all your saved tweets, complete with metadata, images, and thread context. Your digital library, unified.
highlights: Scheduled sync to keep bookmarks updated

features.title: Bulk Actions
features.description: Manage hundreds of bookmarks at once. Multi-select any number of items and apply tags, move to collections, export, or delete in one go. What used to take hours now takes seconds.

features.title: Smart Tags
features.description: Never manually tag again. Our AI analyzes each bookmark's content and suggests relevant tags automatically. Accept, reject, or customize—you're always in control while AI does the grunt work.
highlights: Intelligent tag suggestions based on content
Learn from your tagging patterns over time

features.title: Dark Mode
features.description: Easy on the eyes, day or night. Switch seamlessly between light and dark themes, or let the app automatically adjust based on your system preferences. Every detail designed for maximum readability and style.
highlights: True dark mode optimized for OLED screens
Automatic theme switching by time of day

features.title: Offline-First
features.description: Your bookmarks, always accessible. Everything stored locally for instant access, even without internet. Changes sync automatically when you're back online. No connection required, no compromises made.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Bookmarks?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who've already made the switch
